accountHolder.description: The account holder related to the report.

balanceAccount.description: The balance account related to the report.

balancePlatform.description: Unique identifier of the balance platform.

creationDate.description: Date and time when the event was triggered, in ISO 8601 extended format. For example, **2020-12-18T10:15:30+01:00**.

downloadUrl.description: The URL at which you can download the report. To download, you must authenticate your GET request with your [API credentials](https://docs.adyen.com/api-explorer/#/balanceplatform/latest/overview).
